The '''Escape Pod Deluxe''' was a type of [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] featured on luxury [[Starship/Legends|starships]].

While a regular escape pod featured thin armor and a moderate [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] (rated at 20 SBD), the Deluxe eschewed the shielding for more powerful thrusters and considerably stronger armor.

{{Ship-stub}}
